description_long: This object is a whole Hass avocado with a rough, pebbly dark green to brownish skin, typical of the variety. The surface is uneven, with small bumps and a matte finish, and the skin shows some natural color variation and minor blemishes. The avocado is teardrop-shaped, with a broader, rounded base tapering to a narrower top where a small, dried stem remnant is visible. The skin appears thick and slightly tough, with a semi-soft feel beneath the textured exterior. No cut surfaces are visible, so the creamy, pale green interior and large central seed are implied but not exposed. The object is isolated against a plain white background, with no other items or context present.
description: A whole, rough-skinned Hass avocado with dark green-brown coloration and a small stem remnant, isolated on a white background.
description_view_0: The avocado is seen from the side, showing its teardrop shape, rough skin texture, and the small stem remnant at the narrow end.
description_view_1: The avocado is viewed from the top, highlighting the rounded, bumpy surface and the central position of the stem remnant.
description_view_2: A side view of the avocado, emphasizing its broad base, gradual taper, and the mottled, textured skin.
description_view_3: The avocado is seen from the narrower end, with the stem remnant prominent and the elongated shape visible.
attribute_skin_blemishes: minor dark spots and natural surface irregularities
